description_long: This apartment building complex features a striking, interconnected arrangement of mid-rise blocks, stacked in a staggered, geometric pattern reminiscent of modular architecture. The facades are predominantly white with horizontal striping, and the buildings are interspersed with lush green rooftop gardens and terraces. Multiple open courtyards and communal spaces are visible, including blue swimming pools and landscaped walkways. The structure is surrounded by green terrain, suggesting integration with natural surroundings. Large windows are regularly spaced across the exteriors, providing ample natural light to the interiors. The overall design is modern and emphasizes both community living and access to outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, modular apartment complex with white facades, green rooftop gardens, and blue pools, arranged in a staggered, interconnected pattern.
description_view_0: This view highlights the dense, layered arrangement of the apartment blocks, with visible rooftop gardens and a central courtyard area.
description_view_1: From this angle, the staggered stacking of the buildings is prominent, and the surrounding green terrain is more visible, with some under-structure openings.
description_view_2: This perspective showcases the central communal area with blue pools and landscaped walkways, as well as the terraced arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_3: The rear view emphasizes the height and depth of the stacked blocks, with rooftop greenery and the overall geometric pattern clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in regular, horizontal rows with consistent spacing, creating a uniform and symmetrical appearance across all building faces.
